```python
import os
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import traceback

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# CONFIGURATION & STYLING
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
os.makedirs("figures", exist_ok=True)
DATA_DIR = "exp_results_npy_files"
os.makedirs(DATA_DIR, exist_ok=True)

# Professional scientific styling
plt.rcParams.update({
    'font.size': 14,
    'axes.titlesize': 15,
    'axes.labelsize': 14,
    'legend.fontsize': 12,
    'xtick.labelsize': 12,
    'ytick.labelsize': 12,
    'axes.linewidth': 1.2,
    'figure.dpi': 150,      # Screen preview DPI
    'savefig.dpi': 300,     # Publication DPI
    'savefig.bbox': 'tight'
})

def style_axes(ax):
    """Remove top/right spines and add subtle grid for readability."""
    ax.spines['top'].set_visible(False)
    ax.spines['right'].set_visible(False)
    ax.grid(True, linestyle='--', alpha=0.4, zorder=0)
